cover.title: AI × Robotics Ecosystem: Individual Niche Assessment
cover.subtitle: 64 positions across 6 layers, 3 participation modes

gbp_footnote: Amounts in GBP, converted from USD at 1.27.

en: Every niche can be entered within twelve months. 57 are open now; 7 need six to twelve months. None requires a one-to-two-year runway.
46 of the 64 niches start for under £1,000. 30 need no starting money at all.
No niche needs more than £50,000 to start. The most expensive, a China data-collection operation, needs about £40,000.
L3 Data Infrastructure holds the most solo positions, 8 of 23. Seven of the eight start for under £1,000.
The highest solo ceiling is £315,000, for freelance VLA fine-tuning. It beats the median employee ceiling of £129,500.
Micro-startups carry the highest median ceiling, £157,500. Employees carry the highest median floor, £80,600, with the least variance.
All three crypto niches sit in L3. Each pays nothing today. Their value rests on tokens that have not launched.
cn: 每个生态位都能在12个月内进入。57个现在就能进,7个需6到12个月。没有一个需要1到2年的准备期。
64个生态位中,46个启动资金低于£1,000。其中30个完全不需要启动资金。
没有一个生态位启动需要超过£50,000。最贵的是中国的数据采集场,约£40,000。
L3数据基础设施的solo位最多,23个里占8个。这8个中有7个启动低于£1,000。
solo最高上限是£315,000,来自自由VLA微调。它高于雇员中位上限£129,500。
微创业的中位上限最高,£157,500。雇员的中位下限最高,£80,600,且波动最小。
三个加密生态位都在L3。每个目前都不付现金。其价值取决于尚未发行的代币。

how_to_read.en: This report sorts 64 individual positions by layer and by how you take part. Read the mode and the layer, then the cards.
how_to_read.cn: 本报告把64个个人位置按层和参与方式排列。先看模式和层,再看卡片。

solo.en: Solo operator. You work alone. You sell your own time, data, or output. No team, no outside capital.
solo.cn: Solo operator(个体)。一个人干活,出售自己的时间、数据或产出。无团队、无外部资本。

micro_startup.en: Micro-startup. A team of one to five. You build a product or service and may raise small capital.
micro_startup.cn: Micro-startup(微创业)。1到5人团队,做产品或服务,可能融小额资本。

employee.en: Employee. A salaried job at a company in the layer. Pay is wage plus equity.
employee.cn: Employee(雇员)。在该层公司里的受薪岗位。报酬是工资加股权。

L1.en: L1 Foundation Models — the robot brain. Models that turn cameras and instructions into robot actions.
L1.cn: L1 基础模型——机器人的大脑。把摄像头和指令转成机器人动作的模型。

L2.en: L2 Simulation — virtual worlds and synthetic data to train and test robots before the real world.
L2.cn: L2 仿真——用虚拟世界和合成数据,在进入现实前训练和测试机器人。

L3.en: L3 Data Infrastructure — the pipelines and people that collect and label the data robots learn from.
L3.cn: L3 数据基础设施——采集和标注机器人学习数据的流水线与人力。

L4.en: L4 AI-Native Hardware — the physical machines: humanoids, hands, sensors, and low-cost robot kits.
L4.cn: L4 AI原生硬件——实体机器:人形、灵巧手、传感器和低成本机器人套件。

L5.en: L5 Software and Middleware — the plumbing: operating layers, fleet tools, and safety software.
L5.cn: L5 软件与中间件——管线:操作层、车队工具和安全软件。

L6.en: L6 Vertical Deployments — robots put to work in one industry: warehouses, farms, kitchens, construction.
L6.cn: L6 垂直部署——在某个行业落地干活的机器人:仓储、农场、厨房、工地。

en: Foundation models are built by large, well-funded labs. A single person rarely trains one.
But the work around them is open. You can fine-tune open models, run developer relations, or deploy systems on site.
Entry rewards software skill and a public portfolio, not a doctorate.
cn: 基础模型由资金雄厚的大实验室构建。个人几乎不可能自己训练一个。
但围绕它的活儿是开放的。你可以微调开源模型、做开发者关系、或现场部署系统。
进入靠软件能力和公开作品集,不靠博士学位。

en: Simulation turns 3D scenes and physics into training data. The craft transfers from games and visual effects.
One person can build environments, sell ready-made 3D assets, or write engine plugins.
Salaried roles favor engine programmers. Solo routes favor asset makers and freelancers.
cn: 仿真把3D场景和物理变成训练数据。这门手艺可从游戏和视效平移过来。
一个人能搭环境、卖现成3D资产、或写引擎插件。
受薪岗偏好引擎程序员。Solo路线偏好资产作者和自由职业者。

en: This layer runs on human labor, so it has the most individual entry points. Most cost under £1,000 to start.
You can record robot demonstrations at home, label data, or run a small collection studio.
Pay is modest per hour. The work can be automated away over time.
cn: 这一层靠人力运转,所以个人入口最多。多数启动成本低于£1,000。
你可以在家录制机器人演示、标注数据、或运营小型采集工作室。
时薪不高。这类活儿长期可能被自动化取代。

en: Hardware looks capital-heavy, but open designs changed that. The SO-ARM and LeRobot kits let one person build, sell, or teach.
Salaried operator and technician jobs accept high-school entry.
Margins on kits are thin. Large makers can undercut you.
cn: 硬件看似很重资本,但开源设计改变了这点。SO-ARM和LeRobot套件让一个人能造、能卖、能教。
受薪的操作员和技术员岗接受高中学历。
套件利润薄。大厂能把价格压到你的成本以下。

en: This is the software plumbing of robotics. It rewards ordinary software skill, including self-taught and bootcamp paths.
You can take a salaried ROS2 job, freelance, or sell platform plugins.
Open-source maintainer income is small and slow to build.
cn: 这是机器人的软件管线。它看重普通软件能力,包括自学和训练营出身。
你可以做受薪的ROS2岗、接自由职业、或卖平台插件。
开源维护者收入小且增长慢。

en: Robots earn money here, in real industries. The clearest individual roles are remote operator and field technician. Both are low-barrier.
You can also run a service business: drone inspection, robot cleaning, or weeding.
The main risk is rising autonomy, which thins out operator jobs.
cn: 机器人在这里挣钱,在真实行业里。最清晰的个人岗是远程操作员和现场技术员。两者门槛都低。
你也可以做服务生意:无人机巡检、机器人清洁、或除草。
主要风险是自主化提升,会减少操作员岗位。

L1.risk_en: Better tooling and big-lab open releases erase the niche.
L1.trigger_en: One-click fine-tuning and plug-and-play models ship.
L1.risk_cn: 更好的工具和大厂开源抹平这个位置。
L1.trigger_cn: 一键微调和即插即用模型上线。

L2.risk_en: Generative 3D and world models replace hand-built assets and pipelines.
L2.risk_cn: 生成式3D和世界模型取代手工资产与流水线。
L2.trigger_cn: 文本生3D达到生产级质量。

L3.risk_en: Automated labeling and synthetic data cut demand for human capture.
L3.trigger_en: Models label and generate data well enough to replace people.
L3.risk_cn: 自动标注和合成数据削减对人工采集的需求。
L3.trigger_cn: 模型标注和生成数据好到可替代人。

L4.risk_en: Large makers mass-produce open designs and crush margins.
L4.trigger_en: A major vendor sells kits at scale below your cost.
L4.risk_cn: 大厂量产开源设计,挤压利润。
L4.trigger_cn: 大厂规模化卖套件,价格低于你的成本。

L5.risk_en: Self-service platforms and AI coding shrink integration and junior work.
L5.trigger_en: Platforms automate deployment end to end.
L5.risk_cn: 自助平台和AI编程压缩集成与初级岗。
L5.trigger_cn: 平台把部署端到端自动化。

L6.risk_en: Rising autonomy removes the human operator.
L6.trigger_en: One operator can safely supervise far more robots.
L6.risk_cn: 自主化提升去掉人工操作员。
L6.trigger_cn: 一个操作员能安全看管多得多的机器人。
